---
id: mark-chat-read
title: "Mark the chat as read up to now"
description: "Updates your read position for this group's chat. Use this to track"
sidebar_label: "Mark the chat as read up to now"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Mark the chat as read up to now"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/chat/groups/{groupId}/read"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates your read position for this group's chat. Use this to track
which messages you've seen and compute unread counts.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
